dimensions.evidence: Adds getAttrDef function exported from tags.ts with case-insensitive tag and attribute lookup, plus 4 tests covering happy path, case-insensitivity, and both unknown-tag and unknown-attribute edge cases. Clean, coherent addition consistent with what a plan for this utility would specify.
Only 2 files changed: tags.ts (5-line function) and tags.test.ts (23-line test addition + 1 import). No reformatting, no unrelated churn, no collateral edits.

All 4 tests exercise real logic: known attribute lookup, case-insensitive match via comparison of upper/lower results, unknown tag returns undefined, known-tag/unknown-attr returns undefined. No tests were deleted or weakened; no hard-coded expected values.

Function is trivial: delegates to existing getTagDef for tag lookup, then Array.find with toLowerCase() for attribute matching. Returns undefined on miss, consistent with codebase patterns. No security, correctness, or regression risk.
